  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Office & Operations Assistant",
  "description": "COC Beauty School is a professional beauty education and training center based in Lagos. We specialize in cosmetic formulation training, product development, and business support for individuals and brands in the beauty and personal care industry.

Our office operates as both an administrative center and a hands-on training environment.Our office operates as a quiet, private, and structured work environment, designed to feel homely and focused rather than high-traffic or high-noise.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Office &amp; Operations Assistant&nbsp;

Job Location: Osapa London, Lekki - Lagos&nbsp;

Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	COC Beauty School is hiring a responsible and professional Office &amp; Operations Assistant to support daily activities in our Lagos office and training center.
	Our office operates as a quiet, private, and structured environment, with steady, organized tasks rather than high foot traffic. This role is best suited for individuals who are reliable, self-motivated, and comfortable working in a calm setting.


Key Responsibilities


	Support daily office operations and administrative activities
	Assist during trainings, classes, and office sessions
	Attend to walk-in enquiries and provide basic customer service
	Keep the office organized, active, and professional at all times
	Monitor office supplies and report maintenance or repair needs
	Assist in simple marketing activities such as short videos or office updates
	Ensure staff follow daily routines and office standards
	Prepare daily activity reports for management.


Education &amp; Experience


	OND, HND, BSc Degree or equivalent work experience
	Minimum of 1 year of experience in office administration, customer service, or operations.


Requirements &amp; Skills:


	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Professional attitude and good judgment
	Ability to work independently and follow instructions
	Basic customer service and sales awareness
	Comfortable using a smartphone for simple video tasks
	Trustworthy, discreet, and reliable
	Calm and focused work style.


Remuneration


	Salary: N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.
	Opportunity to earn commissions on product sales
	Performance-based incentives may be available.


Important Note


	For more enquiries, send a WhatsApp message to 08179827083, No calls pls.
	This is a long-term, full-time role in a quiet and structured office environment.
	Only serious confirmations candidates willing to commit should apply.
	Applicants should apply by completing the digital application form at the link above
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Office & Operations Assistant Job at COC Beauty School




        
    

        
        COC Beauty School is a professional beauty education and training center based in Lagos. We specialize in cosmetic formulation training, product development, and business support for individuals and brands in the beauty and personal care industry.

Our office operates as both an administrative center and a hands-on training environment.Our office operates as a quiet, private, and structured work environment, designed to feel homely and focused rather than high-traffic or high-noise.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Office & Operations Assistant 

Job Location: Osapa London, Lekki - Lagos 

Employment Type: Full-time
     

            
    



Description


	COC Beauty School is hiring a responsible and professional Office & Operations Assistant to support daily activities in our Lagos office and training center.
	Our office operates as a quiet, private, and structured environment, with steady, organized tasks rather than high foot traffic. This role is best suited for individuals who are reliable, self-motivated, and comfortable working in a calm setting.


Key Responsibilities


	Support daily office operations and administrative activities
	Assist during trainings, classes, and office sessions
	Attend to walk-in enquiries and provide basic customer service
	Keep the office organized, active, and professional at all times
	Monitor office supplies and report maintenance or repair needs
	Assist in simple marketing activities such as short videos or office updates
	Ensure staff follow daily routines and office standards
	Prepare daily activity reports for management.


Education & Experience


	OND, HND, BSc Degree or equivalent work experience
	Minimum of 1 year of experience in office administration, customer service, or operations.


Requirements & Skills:


	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Professional attitude and good judgment
	Ability to work independently and follow instructions
	Basic customer service and sales awareness
	Comfortable using a smartphone for simple video tasks
	Trustworthy, discreet, and reliable
	Calm and focused work style.


Remuneration


	Salary: N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.
	Opportunity to earn commissions on product sales
	Performance-based incentives may be available.


Important Note


	For more enquiries, send a WhatsApp message to 08179827083, No calls pls.
	This is a long-term, full-time role in a quiet and structured office environment.
	Only serious confirmations candidates willing to commit should apply.
	Applicants should apply by completing the digital application form at the link above
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
